---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)"
description: "Reading for Class 03"
author: 
  - name: Lindsay Hayes
    url: https://lindsaynhayes.github.io
    affiliation: Department of Cell Biology, OUHC
date: 2026-07-10
draft: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

In preparation for our discussion on exploratory data analysis read these great articles on EDA.

The first one is written for business analytics but all the principles are the same. You can skip the example at the end.

[What is EDA?](https://querio.ai/blogs/what-is-exploratory-data-analysis)

The second one is from the R for Data Science Text book:

[*Exploratory Data Analysis* in R for Data Science](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/exploratory-data-analysis.html)
